description: A screenshot from a live Senate floor broadcast (C-SPAN style). The wide shot shows the U.S. Senate chamber with its blue carpet patterned with stars, marble rostrum, blue draperies, and an American flag; the presiding officer sits at the elevated dais and a handful of senators and clerks are at desks on the floor. The graphic element is a standard broadcast lower-third overlay: a blue bar showing the tally 'Yea 51  Nay 44', the gold circular United States Senate seal, and the caption 'Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System'. The overlay is the network's own broadcast chyron, and the rest of the image is a live video frame. On-image text: 'Yea 51 Nay 44'; 'Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System'; 'United States Senate'.
notable_text: Yea 51 Nay 44; Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be a Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
